PUBLISH_SCHEDULE_BETWEEN_DATE.title: Schedule changed
PUBLISH_SCHEDULE_BETWEEN_DATE.content: Schedule between %%FROM_DATE%% to %%TO_DATE%% has been changed.

selfService.firstParagraph: The ACD Installer establishes a connection between the ACD (Automated Call Distribution) system and EvolveWFM. EvolveWFM can then receive ACD events and generate RTA (Real Time Adherence) information.
selfService.instructions_1: 1. Download installer distribution from Self Service, On-Prem Integration Area
selfService.instructions_2: 2. UnZip downloaded installer distribution to a convenient location (e.g. C:/Temp/AvayaCMSInstaller)
selfService.instructions_3: 3. To start installation execute install.bat on Windows or install.sh on Linux
selfService.instructions_4: 4. Follow Installer Wizard to configure your Avaya CMS ASC
selfService.generateKeyExplanation: You must be an Administrator to generate an API key

modal.title: Enter your EvolveWFM email address and password, then click Generate
modal.result: API Key has been generated successfully
